name: sos2526-18
description: Project focused on cereal productions, food supply utilization and cost of healthy diet

scripts.build: cd src/front && npm install && npm run build
scripts.dev-front: cd src/front && npm run dev -- --  open
scripts.test: npm run build && (node index.js & npx wait-on http://localhost:12345) && npx newman run tests/test-cereal-productions.json -e tests/local.json && npx newman run tests/test-cost-of-healthy-diet-by-countries.json -e tests/local.json && npx newman run tests/test-food-supply-utilization-accounts.json -e tests/local.json

author: Jose Luis Alcon Del Villar, Manuel Castro Sanchez, Nazaret Villalba Delgado
